name: Utah vs. Idaho Comp for Machine Injuries

mainEntity.name: Utah vs Idaho workers' comp differences for machine injuries crossing Boise/Murray?
mainEntity.text: Utah vs Idaho workers' comp differences for machine injuries crossing Boise/Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 66.67% wages, 312-week max PPD; Idaho similar but different caps/schedules—file where injured.[2]

suggestedAnswer.text: Border workers file in injury state. Utah Labor Commission stricter reporting. Boise firms handle dual jurisdiction. Compare benefits tables.[2]

description: Utah: 66.67% wages, 312-week max PPD; Idaho similar but different caps/schedules—file where injured.[2]
